meaning: n.牧羊人,牧羊狗v.牧羊,看管,带领
examples: The shepherd followed, carrying a torch to light his way.
The Lord is my shepherd and I shall ask for nothing.
Shepherd explains that weather is akin to mood, but climate is analogous to personality.
The sea level was about 10 inches higher in 2012 than in 1900, Shepherd said.
